title: hyobanche fulleri
intro: Hyobanche fulleri, also known as the poison pipe or poison pipe plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anthelmintic and insecticidal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hyobanche fulleri include its ability to treat intestinal worms and other parasitic infections, as well as its use as an insect repellent. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to create a tonic or remedy.
